results.title: Twelve flags south
results.creator_credit: L.V. Hudson, W.K. Fraser, ABC and International Television Federation
results.brief_description: A documentary on international co-operation in Antarctica among twelve nations - signatories to the Antarctica treaty, which has “frozen” all territorial claims in the continent leaving it a vast laboratory for peaceful exploration and research. The tour includes travelling with the US convoy through pack ice en route to McMurdo station; visiting the Russian base at Mirny and the US base at the South Pole; scientists of many lands working on upper atmosphere research and exploring caves; New Zealand explorers with dog-sledges, Americans in sno-cats, and finally historic films of early explorers Shackleton, Mawson and Byrd.
results.creator_credit_for_label: L.V. Hudson, W.K. Fraser, ABC and International Television Federation

results.title: TVA = Tennessee Valley Authority
results.brief_description: An impersonal survey of the dams built, the irrigation, navigation, and industrial advantages accruing to the people of the Tennessee Valley as a result of this, and the advances made by both agriculture and industry, and social services, since the inception of the Tennessee Valley Authority’s scheme.

results.title: Tuning up for life
results.creator_credit: Reni Mertens, Walter Marti and Teleproduction Zurich
results.brief_description: A class of young children from the Institute of Rhythmics, Zurich, at work under the direction of Mimi Scheiblauer, who built the Institute on the principles of Calcroze’s eurhythmics. Children’s natural urge to move around and make a noise is guided by music and used to develop qualities of control and attention. Miss Scheiblauer discusses some of the principles involved.

results.title: Tukiki and his search for a Merry Christmas
results.creator_credit: Vic Atkinson, Beryl Friesen, W.H. Stephens and Pooled Film Services
results.brief_description: An animated children’s film in which Tukiki, an Eskimo boy, sees Christmas celebrated all over the world. Uses beautiful xerox and pastel backgrounds throughout. Created and written by Christine Atkinson with the voice of Sterling Holloway.

results.title: True homance
results.brief_description: As a memorial to love, the filmmaker turns to the camera in an attempt to document the experiences he shared with his first boyfriend, only to find the filmmaking process as illusive as memory.

results.title: Trouble in town
results.creator_credit: Kevin Murray and Bairnsdale Technical School
results.brief_description: Under the supervision of Kevin Murray, 1st year Diploma students participated in a film exercise as part of their film appreciation classes. Their theme for practical study was the “classic chase” of the goodies after the baddies. This is a silent film.
